# rSuStaIn

The `rSuStaIn` package provides an R wrapper for the
[pySuStaIn](https://github.com/ucl-pond/pySuStaIn) Python package, which
implements the Subtype and Stage Inference (SuStaIn) algorithm. SuStaIn
is an unsupervised learning algorithm that identifies disease subtypes
and stages from cross-sectional data.

## Features

This package provides R wrappers for the three main SuStaIn algorithms:

- **Ordinal SuStaIn** (`run_OSA`): For ordinal/scored biomarker data
- **Z-score SuStaIn** (`run_ZscoreSustain`): For continuous biomarker
  measurements
- **Mixture Model SuStaIn** (`run_MixtureSustain`): For event-based
  disease progression modeling

## Installation

Install the R package from GitHub:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ucdavis/rSuStaIn")
```

Then install the pySuStaIn Python package:

``` r
library(rSuStaIn)
install_pySuStaIn()
```

## Basic Usage

### Ordinal SuStaIn (for scored data)

``` r
library(rSuStaIn)

# For ordinal/scored biomarker data
results <- run_OSA(
  patient_data = your_data,
  biomarker_levels = biomarker_levels,
  SuStaInLabels = names(biomarker_levels),
  N_startpoints = 25,
  N_S_max = 3
)
```

### Z-score SuStaIn (for continuous data)

``` r
# For continuous biomarker measurements
results <- run_ZscoreSustain(
  data = your_biomarker_matrix,
  biomarker_labels = biomarker_names,
  N_startpoints = 25,
  N_S_max = 3
)
```

### Mixture Model SuStaIn (event-based)

``` r
# For event-based disease progression modeling
results <- run_MixtureSustain(
  data = your_biomarker_matrix,
  biomarker_labels = biomarker_names,
  N_startpoints = 25,
  N_S_max = 3
)
```

## Documentation

See the [Getting Started
vignette](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/vignettes/getting-started.Rmd)
for detailed usage examples.

## References

Young, A. L., Vogel, J. W., Aksman, L. M., Wijeratne, P. A., Eshaghi,
A., Oxtoby, N. P., … & Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative.
(2021). Ordinal SuStaIn: Subtype and Stage Inference for Clinical
Scores, Visual Ratings, and Other Ordinal Data. *Frontiers in Artificial
Intelligence*, 4, 613261.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build_rds_path()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/build_rds_path.md)
  : Find path to RDS file with output

- [`build_score_vals()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/build_score_vals.md)
  : Construct the table indicating how many levels each biomarker has

- [`compute_prob_correct2()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/compute_prob_correct2.md)
  : Title

- [`compute_prob_dist()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/compute_prob_dist.md)
  :

  Computes `p(true | obs)`? for each biomarker

- [`compute_prob_dist2()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/compute_prob_dist2.md)
  : Title

- [`compute_prob_scores()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/compute_prob_scores.md)
  : Compute probabilities of true biomarker levels

- [`compute_score_levels()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/compute_score_levels.md)
  : Title

- [`cvic_sim_data`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/cvic_sim_data.md)
  : CVIC results from simulated data

- [`.onLoad()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/dot-onLoad.md)
  :

  Actions taken when `rSuStaIn` is loaded

- [`event_order_heatmap()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/event_order_heatmap.md)
  : Event order heatmap

- [`example_likelihoods`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/example_likelihoods.md)
  : Example likelihoods from SuStaIn models

- [`extract_cvic()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/extract_cvic.md)
  : Extract CVIC element from an object

- [`extract_results_from_pickle()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/extract_results_from_pickle.md)
  : Extract results from pickle file

- [`extract_results_from_pickles()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/extract_results_from_pickles.md)
  : Extract results from multiple pickle files

- [`get_levels()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/get_levels.md)
  : Extract levels from a set of variable names

- [`install_pySuStaIn()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/install_pySuStaIn.md)
  :

  Install the `pySuStaIn` python package from github

- [`plot_CVIC()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/plot_CVIC.md)
  : Plot a CVIC curve

- [`plot_cv_loglik()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/plot_cv_loglik.md)
  : Plot cross-validated per-fold log-likelihood distributions

- [`run_MixtureSustain()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/run_MixtureSustain.md)
  : Run Mixture Model SuStaIn Algorithm

- [`run_OSA()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/run_OSA.md)
  : Run the Ordinal SuStaIn Algorithm (OSA)

- [`run_OSA_permuted()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/run_OSA_permuted.md)
  : Randomly permute some some variables and run the OSA model on the
  permuted data

- [`run_ZscoreSustain()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/run_ZscoreSustain.md)
  : Run Z-score SuStaIn Algorithm

- [`run_and_save_OSA()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/run_and_save_OSA.md)
  : Run the Ordinal SuStaIn algorithm (OSA) or load results from
  presaved .rds file if available

- [`save_run_info()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/save_run_info.md)
  : Save run info to file

- [`sim_data`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/sim_data.md)
  : Simulated data

- [`sim_subtype_and_stage_table`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/sim_subtype_and_stage_table.md)
  : Simulated subtype-and-stage table

- [`stage_barplot()`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/stage_barplot.md)
  : Plot estimated stage counts

- [`stage_barplot(`*`<SuStaIn_model>`*`)`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/stage_barplot.SuStaIn_model.md)
  : Plot estimated stage counts

- [`stage_barplot(`*`<default>`*`)`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/stage_barplot.default.md)
  : Plot estimated stage counts

- [`stage_barplot(`*`<list>`*`)`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/stage_barplot.list.md)
  : Plot estimated stage counts

- [`test_data`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/test_data.md)
  : Test Data

- [`test_data_v1`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/test_data_v1.md)
  : Test Data - Visit 1

- [`test_subtype_and_stage_table`](https://ucdavis.github.io/rSuStaIn/reference/test_subtype_and_stage_table.md)
  : Simulated subtype-and-stage table
